title: What is the funniest moment youve seen on Eva
display_title: What is the funniest moment youve seen on Eva
wikitext:
[]: What is the funniest moment you've seen on Eva?             Quote Post by Kaworu-chan » Sun May 23, 2010 1:26 pm What is the funniest scene you have ever saw on the series? Mine would be the part where Shinji and Asuka are running late to school and Shinji bumps into alternate Rei and she accuses Shinji of being a pervert!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 23, 2010 1:32 pm I think the funniest moment is in EoE when Shinji and Asuka are on the beach and he chokes her. Wut?

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Sun May 23, 2010 1:35 pm For me it was that hillarous gag dub ADV released years ago. That was a riot! Valley Girl Misato, Black Hyuga and Curela De Ritsuko FTW!

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Sun May 23, 2010 3:26 pm I never heard the gag dub

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Sun May 23, 2010 3:31 pm scarmullet wrote: I never heard the gag dub

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun May 23, 2010 3:48 pm scarmullet wrote: I never heard the gag dub

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun May 23, 2010 4:47 pm ..... ...................... Well, this thread went downhill fast. Rei's perfect landing on top of Shinji and Asuka in The Day Tokyo-3 Stood Still was pretty fantastic as far as humor in the show goes, not that anyone seems to actually be reading this thread for that.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun May 23, 2010 5:42 pm reaction shot ep08

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Sun May 23, 2010 7:08 pm That one was definitely worth it.

[]:             Quote Post by paranoidandroid » Sun May 23, 2010 9:16 pm The whole alternate reality thing in EoTV is pretty funny. Oh, when Asuka wakes up Shinji during that part.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun May 23, 2010 10:02 pm The look on Pen's face staring at Shinji's erection was pretty funny.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Tue May 25, 2010 9:17 am Thermal Expansion

[]:             Quote Post by Podferio » Tue May 25, 2010 10:17 am Mine would be in ep22 when the light beamed down on Unit 02 and the Hallelujiah music played XD. I was watching seriously and that scene made lol

[]:             Quote Post by broham513 » Tue May 25, 2010 10:40 am "bologna pony"

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue May 25, 2010 5:18 pm Podferio wrote: Mine would be in ep22 when the light beamed down on Unit 02 and the Hallelujiah music played XD. I was watching seriously and that scene made lol

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue May 25, 2010 8:49 pm Episode 2, with Shinji living in Misato's apartment for the first time, along with this : http://img203.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap2010052521h47m34.png/ Anybody who cracks at that owes me a quarter. It's that funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 25, 2010 9:01 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: ...that scene is considered one of the most nightmarish scenes IN NGE. That's like me saying that the funniest part for me would be when the Harpies ate Unit 02.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue May 25, 2010 9:45 pm ^ I wouldn't consider both of those scenes funny. You guys are sick. Oh, and Vegeta 20XX, that first fight with Israfel was funny... and messed up. How messed up? Made Misato look like this: http://www.animegalleries.net/img/9739

[]:             Quote Post by AVman9 » Tue May 25, 2010 11:36 pm I'm going to have to go with "Here's your change!"

[]:             Quote Post by Podferio » Wed May 26, 2010 8:59 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: ...that scene is considered one of the most nightmarish scenes IN NGE. That's like me saying that the funniest part for me would be when the Harpies ate Unit 02. I think the first fight with Israfel was pretty funny, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 23, 2010 1:3
